description: Detects raw generic type usage in Java (List, Map, Set, etc. without type parameters). Simplified from Rust: flags local_variable_declaration nodes. Cannot cross-reference against the known-generics list, check @SuppressWarnings("rawtypes"), detect raw return types, or suggest type parameters from RHS initialization.

flag.message: local variable declaration detected -- verify generic types have type parameters (raw_types detection simplified: type analysis not available in JSON DSL)
